Betrothal Invitation

CeraandTony

A promise made in prayer,
with two families gathered in joy.

10Oct
2026

Saturday, October 10, 2026

Begin

With joyful hearts

You are warmly invited

Sheela & Saji Francis invite you to join in prayer and celebration as Cera and Tony begin their journey of promise, family and grace.

With love and prayers, Sheela & Saji Francis

10Oct
2026

The Lord has done great things for us, and we are filled with joy.

Psalm 126:3
DateSaturday, October 10, 2026
Time11:00 AM
VenueSt. Mary's Forane Church, Kanjoor

A quiet moment

Before the promise

A gentle pause in the invitation, placed after the formal welcome so the story becomes personal as the page unfolds.

Awaiting the sacred day

105 days until the betrothal
105Days
18Hours
21Minutes
33Seconds

The grace of union

Two families, one promise

With gratitude for the homes, prayers and generations that shaped Cera and Tony, this promise is held by both families with joy.

01

Our Beloved Daughter

Cera

D/o Sheela & Saji Francis

A daughter carrying the warmth, prayers and heritage of her family into this promise.

Granddaughter of

the late Brijit Francis and the late P.K. FrancisParacka House, Kanjoor&
the late Ally Mathan and the late T.A. MathanThekkekkara House, Irinjalakuda
02

Our Beloved Son

Tony

S/o Mini Anto & Anto Antony

A son shaped by faith, family values and the generations who walked before him.

Grandson of

the late Chinnamma and C.M. AntonyChakkankulam House, Pala&
the late Chinnamma and T.J. JosephThekkumthottam House, Ponkunnam
&

Saturday, October 10

Order of the sacred day

Kindly be present for both prayer and the celebratory meal that follows.

01

11:00 AM

Betrothal Ceremony

Morning Service

St. Mary's Forane ChurchKanjoor, Kerala

Two families gather in prayer as promises are first spoken in the presence of God and loved ones.

View directions
02

12:30 PM onwards

Reception

Afternoon Gathering

O.L.D. Church Parish HallKaippattoor, Kerala

A warm family meal and celebration following the ceremony, shared in fellowship and joy.

View directions

Sharing the happiness

With prayers and joy

Fr. Francis SJMathews & MerinBastin & RiyaAustin

Write a personal blessing

Words of grace

Near or far, your warm thoughts and prayers can be kept as a personal note on this invitation.

Guestbook notes3 wishes

“May God shower you both with boundless grace and love on this beautiful journey.”

Saji & SheelaFamily blessing

“Welcoming our dear Cera into our family with all our love.”

Anto & MiniFamily blessing

“Prayers and blessings for a holy and joyful union in Christ.”

Fr. Francis SJWith prayers
